flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St Bonaventure University rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($22.5k → $25.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at St Bonaventure University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (68.5% → 58.9%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at St Bonaventure University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.6k → $41.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St Bonaventure University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
